description: An employee is being placed on a 3-day paid suspension pending the outcome of an investigation.

nodes.task_description: Inform the employee of the suspension and its terms.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP and manager deliver the news to the employee.

nodes.task_description: Update the employee's status in the HRIS to 'Suspended' for the specified date range.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP correctly updates the employee's status.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with IT to temporarily disable the employee's system access during the suspension.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP creates a ticket for IT to temporarily suspend access.
